original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Henry, James, Emma, and Isabella. "If Henry is a knight then James is a knave," Henry declared. James stated, "Isabella is a knave if and only if Emma is a knight". As Emma put it, "James is a knight if and only if Henry is a knave". Isabella stated, "Henry is a knight and James is a knave". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
